before.title: City to Close Hover Street/CO 119 Intersection for Roof Work
before.body:
The city will temporarily shut down the intersection of Hover Street and CO 119 from June 28 due to roof work at the library. Residents and local drivers should plan alternative routes or expect delays during this time.

before.title: City Council to Vote on Roof Contract for Longmont Library
before.body:
The city council will vote this week on a contract for roof work at the public library, impacting local government spending and construction timelines.

As outlined in the upcoming agenda [Source](evidence:13), the contract is part of essential maintenance efforts to ensure the library remains safe
